_doc: Which level-frame badge the HUD level chip shows, by player Level. Badges are games/grove/assets/ui/<dir>/<prefix>NN.png, sliced from assets/board/lvls.png (plainest ring 00 -> crown 15). Even-tier mapping: idx = clamp(floor((level-1)/levels_per_tier), 0, badge_count-1). levels_per_tier is the one dial to retune pacing.
